name: regression-account-termination-by-user
description: AI mis-classifies a user-initiated account closure (a credit) as service-initiated termination (a flag).
documentText: You may close your account at any time from settings. We will retain anonymised analytics data for 24 months after closure.
rawAiResponse: {"serviceType":"general_tech","flags":[{"category":"account_termination_no_notice","severity":"full","quote":"You may close your account at any time from settings"}],"credits":[]}
expectedReason: negation guard rejects 'You may close your account' classified as service-initiated termination
